# domain/user.py
class User:
    def __init__(self, user_id):
        self.id = user_id

# infra/storage.py
import boto3

def upload_user_avatar(user_id, file_path):
    # Correct: infrastructure concerns isolated from domain
    s3 = boto3.client('s3')
    s3.upload_file(file_path, 'my-bucket', f'avatars/{user_id}')
